items.title: Ask HN: What are you building that's not AI related?
items.summary: I don't have anything against AI, but HN (and everywhere else) seems to be drowning in AI atm. Seems like every man and his dog is building an AI agent harness. And power to you (and your dog) if that's you. But it would be refreshing to hear about some non AI related projects people are working on. Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47700460 Points: 1 # Comments: 0

items.title: One Million Prompt – $1 per block, AI generates collective art daily
items.summary: In 2005, Alex Tew sold 1 million pixels for $1 each and made internet history. In 2026, I built the AI version — One Million Prompt. Every block holds an AI prompt. Every day, all prompts combine into one collective artwork generated by AI. 4 blocks claimed so far. 999,996 left. https://onemillionprompt.com Also launching today on Product Hunt: https://www.producthunt.com/posts/one-million-prompt Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47700353 Points: 1 # Comments: 0
